name: upgrade-go
description: Migration pack: upgrade the Go toolchain/language version, resolve breakages, keep the build and tests green.

files.content:
# Steering — {{TITLE}}

Goal: upgrade the Go version in go.mod and the toolchain, fixing every breakage, with build and tests green on the new version.

Conventions:
- Bump `go` directive in go.mod; document the target version in design.md.
- Address deprecations surfaced by `go vet` on the new toolchain.
- Zero external-dependency additions (stdlib-first invariant).

# Tasks — {{TITLE}} (template)

Task DAG shape (fill in `files:` and `verify:` per your repo):

- T1 Bump go.mod `go` directive and CI toolchain. deps: —
- T2 Resolve compile breakages. deps: T1
- T3 Clear new vet/deprecation findings. deps: T2
- T4 Green build + tests on the new version. deps: T3
